sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115556" key="yeudo/pura" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδό-πῠρα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n115556.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">false watch-fires,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9008.tlg001:8:86" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Macar.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.86</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
